label: Process Steps
description: Numbered process steps displayed in a horizontal flow with connecting lines. Each step has number circle, title, and description. Use for onboarding flows, how-it-works, checkout processes. Layout: horizontal numbered circles connected by lines on desktop, vertical on mobile.

test_data.heading: How It Works
test_data.subheading: Get started in four simple steps

steps.title: Create Account
steps.description: Sign up with your email and choose a plan that fits your needs. No credit card required for the free trial.

steps.title: Configure Settings
steps.description: Customize your workspace, invite team members, and set up integrations with your existing tools.

steps.title: Launch Project
steps.description: Create your first project, import data, and start building with our intuitive drag-and-drop interface.

steps.title: Track Results
steps.description: Monitor performance with real-time analytics and optimize your workflow based on actionable insights.
